title: Extend electron/preload.ts and src/tipos/global.d.ts with update.* bridge API
description: Extend the existing contextBridge bridge object with an update namespace, and keep global.d.ts AppBridge in sync. UpdateStatusPayload must mirror the renderer-side UpdateStatus union from '## Components / 2.' in context.md so that subtask_03 (hook) and subtask_04 (component) consume it directly.
acceptance_criteria: electron/preload.ts: bridge object exposes update: { check, download, install, getVersion, onStatus }
update.onStatus: (cb: (p: UpdateStatusPayload) => void) => () => void — subscribes to ipcRenderer.on('update:status', ...) and returns an unsubscribe function
contextIsolation/sandbox semantics preserved (no Node API leaks; no exposing ipcRenderer directly)

src/tipos/global.d.ts exports/declares UpdateStatusPayload as a discriminated union matching exactly the UpdateStatus union in context.md (kinds: idle, checking, not-available, available, downloading, downloaded, error, plus dev-mode if needed)
AppBridge interface gains an update: { ... } field whose signatures match preload.ts exactly
tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json AND tsc on the renderer config both succeed
completion_summary: Extended preload.ts and global.d.ts with update.* bridge: check/download/install/getCurrentVersion + onStatus(cb)=>unsubscribe; UpdateStatusPayload union mirrored on both sides.
